name: Shafeeqah Soeker
quote: Having attended Hajj last year, I can confidently say that this course was incredibly beneficial. It gave me the ability to communicate, even at a basic level, with Arabic-speaking locals — which added so much value to my experience. I made a friend in Makkah who only speaks Arabic.

name: Fadeelah Kenny
quote: I was quite apprehensive about immersing myself in an Arabic environment — I find speaking and memorising Arabic difficult. Muallima Rukayya managed to put us at ease and had us speaking and understanding sentences with ease, alhamdulillah. Highly recommend.

name: Fierdous Solomon
quote: We are blessed to sit at the feet of a female scholar with this wealth of knowledge — in Qur’an, Arabic, Fiqh, Aqeedah, Tafseer, and all the Islamic sciences. As women, we need to equip ourselves with the tools and guidelines from Allah and His Messenger.
